recommendations.title: In the Blood
recommendations.overview: When her husband goes missing during their Caribbean vacation, a woman sets off on her own to take down the men she thinks are responsible.

recommendations.title: Dark Tide
recommendations.overview: A traumatized shark expert must battle her own fears to lead a thrill-seeking businessman on a dive into a dangerous section of water known as "Shark Alley."

recommendations.title: Crazy/Beautiful
recommendations.overview: At Pacific Palisades High, a poor Latino falls hard for a troubled girl from the affluent neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Armed Response
recommendations.overview: The story follows a team of highly trained operatives who find themselves trapped inside an isolated military compound.

recommendations.title: Cat Run
recommendations.overview: When a sexy, high-end escort holds the key evidence to a scandalous government cover-up, two bumbling young detectives become her unlikely protectors from a ruthless assassin hired to silence her.

recommendations.title: Kid Cannabis
recommendations.overview: An eighteen year old high school drop out and his twenty-seven year old friend start trafficking marijuana across the border of Canada in order to make money and their lives are changed forever.

recommendations.title: Turistas
recommendations.overview: A group of young backpackers' vacation turns sour when a bus accident leaves them marooned in a remote Brazilian rural area that holds an ominous secret.

recommendations.title: Seal Team Six: The Raid on Osama Bin Laden

recommendations.title: Blue Crush
recommendations.overview: Nothing gets between Anne Marie and her board. Living in a beach shack with three roommates, she is up before dawn every morning to conquer the waves and count the days until the Pipe Masters competition. Having transplanted herself to Hawaii with no

recommendations.title: Please Don't Destroy: The Treasure of Foggy Mountain
recommendations.overview: When three friends who live together realize that they don't like their life trajectory, they set off to find a gold treasure that is rumored to be buried in the nearby mountain.
